title: The Swordsmith's Tempering Chart
strategies: do-nothing baseline: submit an empty schedule (n=0), leaving the blade exactly as forged
mean-threshold recipe: estimate one 'safe' temperature from the average nucleation threshold across the whole billet and hold it for every affordable step

internal system-identification search: replicate the stated kinetics in-process, sweep candidate constant plateaus (anchored at every distinct threshold value present in the billet) together with early stopping along each simulated trajectory, and keep the plateau+duration pair with the lowest simulated final defect count

protect-vs-sacrifice trade study: explicitly compare 'hold just under the coldest grain's threshold' against 'accept runaway damage in a fragile minority to heat the majority faster', choosing whichever the simulated trajectory actually minimizes
